apps.name: Outlook CLI
apps.subtitle: Outlook 365 from your terminal
apps.description: Read, send, search, and manage Outlook 365 emails, calendar, and contacts from the terminal. No API keys or admin consent required.
apps.longDescription: A full-featured CLI for Outlook 365 with 30+ commands — inbox, send, reply, forward, drafts, scheduled send, calendar CRUD, categories, signatures, attachments, and contacts. Uses browser-based token capture via Playwright so there's no Azure app registration, admin consent, or API keys to configure. Auto-JSON output when piped, structured envelope format, and short display numbers for quick message referencing.
features: Inbox with filters — sender, subject, date, attachments, categories
Send, reply, forward with confirmation prompts
Drafts and scheduled send with flexible time formats
Full calendar CRUD — create, update, delete, recurring events
Auto-JSON output when piped — no flag needed
Browser-based auth — no API keys or admin consent
